title: RAG 的整体流程：从资料到答案，一条链路讲清楚

titles.original: RAG 的整体流程：从资料到答案，一条链路讲清楚
titles.wechat: RAG 的整体流程：从资料到答案，一条链路讲清楚
titles.juejin: RAG 的整体流程：从资料到答案，一条链路讲清楚
titles.zhihu: RAG 的整体流程：从资料到答案，一条链路讲清楚

platforms.automation: requires md2wechat discovery/inspect before draft creation
requires WECHATSYNC_TOKEN and Chrome extension login state
requires WECHATSYNC_TOKEN and Chrome extension login state

convert: md2wechat convert "src/content/blog/zh/AI/2.Rag/01.整体步骤.md" --mode ai --theme autumn-warm --title "RAG 的整体流程：从资料到答案，一条链路讲清楚" -o "publish/artifacts/<run-id>/src-content-blog-zh-AI-2-Rag-01-wechat.html"

rules: text fences that describe flows, ledgers, or key points become note blocks with preserved line breaks.
real code blocks keep language labels, indentation, and readable long-line behavior.
if WeChat compresses pre/code whitespace, use line-preserved HTML with nbsp indentation.

never: Do not use wechatsync -p weixin for the final WeChat draft.

dryRun: WECHATSYNC_TOKEN=<from-env> wechatsync sync "src/content/blog/zh/AI/2.Rag/01.整体步骤.md" -p juejin --title "RAG 的整体流程：从资料到答案，一条链路讲清楚" --cover <missing-cover> --dry-run
draft: WECHATSYNC_TOKEN=<from-env> wechatsync sync "src/content/blog/zh/AI/2.Rag/01.整体步骤.md" -p juejin --title "RAG 的整体流程：从资料到答案，一条链路讲清楚" --cover <missing-cover>
juejin.note: Run Juejin and Zhihu as separate single-platform syncs when local images are present.

dryRun: WECHATSYNC_TOKEN=<from-env> wechatsync sync "src/content/blog/zh/AI/2.Rag/01.整体步骤.md" -p zhihu --title "RAG 的整体流程：从资料到答案，一条链路讲清楚" --cover <missing-cover> --dry-run
draft: WECHATSYNC_TOKEN=<from-env> wechatsync sync "src/content/blog/zh/AI/2.Rag/01.整体步骤.md" -p zhihu --title "RAG 的整体流程：从资料到答案，一条链路讲清楚" --cover <missing-cover>
zhihu.note: Run Juejin and Zhihu as separate single-platform syncs when local images are present.
